# Strategic Startup Advisors – Catalyzing founder success

![](https://exforddemo.files.wordpress.com/2019/08/tom-winckels-i7olrdm9yiw-unsplash.jpg)

“A goal without a plan is just a wish.”

## Our Services

We help founders:

*   Create **financial models**
*   Determine **business trajectory**
*   Conduct **market analysis**
*   And **much, much more!**

## Plan for success together

Identify and clarify your product, vision for success, target market, financial projections, marketing strategy, and so much more

![](https://strategicstartupadvisors.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/ssalogo1.png?w=689)

company.description:
# Expert Venture Capital Consulting Services for Startups

## We help the best companies raise and scale

The advisory firm behind $3B+ in funding and 20+ exits 

*   Early-stage to Series D+ across 90+ industries
*   Niche investor-grade expertise
*   Purpose-built for Tier-1 founders

## Our work in press

As remote working keeps rolling, Oyster raises $59M Series D at $1.2B valuation

A startup is transforming sales and marketing automation by raising  
$12.5M in a seed round

Tapcheck raises $225M  to reinvent payroll

Solana ecosystem’s DePIN project secures $1M angel round funding

They Teamed Up On Databricks and perplexity. Now They’re Launching Their Own $150M fund

Klevu & Searchspring form Athos Commerce, a leading AI-powered  
e-comm optimization platform

Saudi Arabia-based healthtech Aumet, has raised a $7M pre-Series A funding round

Saudi Arabia Made Over  
$100M From Its Nintendo Stock Sale

Landbase raises $30M Series A  
led by Ashton Kutcher’s Sound Ventures

Aman launches Aman Interiors with limited edition furniture collections

A Nottingham, UK-based orthobiologics company, raised  
€9.2M in funding

![decorative](https://waveup.com/_next/image/?url=%2Fimages%2F2025%2F02%2FFrame-47701-1.webp&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_EeD1F4My2j7A8qBer7JkACRNG2DX)

## Fundraising has never  
been more challenging than in 2026 

Investor replies are at the lowest levels ever

AI has created more competition, in every category

Products are getting commoditized, fast – no one buys tech moat anymore

Execution and scalable GTM is critical

### ChatGPT narratives and strategies simply don’t resonate

Fundraising today requires deep, relevant market insight, unique positioning and best-in-class story to win over investors.  
This is exactly where Waveup excels.

## We deliver work that converts

We help to create industry-leading materials and draft strategies that fast track the growth & capital journey

TRACTION

630M+

raised by our clients in 2025

EARLY STAGE SUPPORT

$49M 

raised across 15 pre-seed  
&  seed rounds in 2025

LATE STAGE RESULTS

50+

Series A+ and late stage rounds

EXITS

20+

M&A exits supported by Waveup team

## Expert support from fundraising, to growth and exit

## Real results, real impact

## $4M pre-seed deck

Short pitch deck and longer business plan that were used to secure $4M funding round

*   Revamped story + deck look & feel
*   Used to secure capital in weeks
*   Loved by investors

17 slides deck

60+ slides business plan

9 days  
to deliver

[VIEW Slides](https://waveup.com/#modal-case-1)

## $77M RE project

Luxury hotel presentation used to pitch private investors and government bodies for funding

*   Elevated branding from scratch
*   Compelling project presentation
*   Data-driven storytelling

21 slides

2 weeks

$77Mraised in 3 months 

[VIEW Slides](https://waveup.com/#modal-case-2)

## $30M fund deck

Fundraising materials (CIM + pitch deck) that helped to secure capital from LPs to launch Fund 1

*   Deep dive & research on the opportunity
*   Storytelling & content targeted at LPs
*   Captivating professional design

15 slides deck

63 pages CIM

30+investors engaged

[VIEW Slides](https://waveup.com/#modal-case-3)

[See our portfolio](https://waveup.com/portfolio/)

## Our clients are financed by the best in the market

## FAQ

We provide consulting services across three core areas:

• Fundraising. We help high-growth teams prepare for early stage to Series A-D+ rounds by building pitch decks, financial models, and investor narratives;  
• Business growth. We develop go-to-market blueprints and help with market entry and sales planning;  
• M&A support. We craft CIMs, define valuation logic, and position your business for buyers.

That being said, every project is unique. We normally engage with one client on 4-5+ projects over the years, and help across multiple different areas of growth and business development – from marketing materials, to website development and investor communications.

Yes, we do. While our main focus is Series A+ companies with real traction, we also work with pre-seed and seed startups if we believe the business has solid potential.

Over the years, we’ve supported over 150 pre-seed rounds (up to $5M) and 100+ successful seed raises ($1M-$10M+) across different verticals. For early-stage teams, we don’t just help with the story and pitch deck; we also run a VC readiness assessment and help prepare for investor conversations, positioning, and next steps.

Absolutely. Our sweet spot is high-growth companies raising capital at Series A to Series D+ stage. We have worked on multiple large late-stage rounds up to $150M+ in the technology, deep-tech, healthcare and biotech space among others. What differentiates us is our unique experience of how to craft a compelling story, fast execution as well as in-depth knowledge of the expectations around growth, retention and GTM metrics expected at various stages.

Yes, we have extensive experience in the M&A space as two of our partners come from investment banking background, including JP Morgan and Lazard. Over the years, we supported multiple businesses on $10M-$100M+ transactions, both on sell and buy side. Our core expertise lies in drafting compelling CIMs, completing business valuations and helping in preparing for due diligence and management presentations.

We’re not brokers, so we generally don’t engage in investor outreach. We do work closely with 120+ VC funds globally, and if you have the right metrics that fit our investor profile, we’re happy to make warm intros. However, these are mostly relevant for revenue-generating companies in Series A+ rounds.

Absolutely! While most of our work is with VC-backed businesses, in the past, we successfully developed materials for non-profits.

Best to reach out to us directly so we can understand what you’re working on and advise on scope and pricing.

We have unique expertise across various verticals, industries, and geographies and an unmatched success track record. We see and work on more deals than anyone else in the market – $3B+ raised, 50+ Series A and late-stage rounds, and 20+ M&A exits, just to name a few.

Our results speak for themselves: founders usually stay with us for 4-5 rounds and engage our team on multiple various projects over the years.

At Waveup, we offer more than pitch deck services.

While most pitch deck agencies focus on design – you give them the content, and they make it look good – we go much deeper.

We build the full investment case – from the market logic and investor narrative to the financial model and the deck itself. So, we work on content, strategy, and, of course, award-winning design that VCs / investors love and that prioritizes the right messages and the right story (proven across multiple successful raises).

Beyond fundraising, we can also help you grow or prepare for a sale, whatever stage you’re at.

We deliver similar level of expertise and service, but with a different approach. We see management consultant firms excelling in the areas of market research and in-depth strategic blueprints. Our advantage lies in powerful storytelling specifically for investment / M&A purposes. We also invest a lot of time in working closely with your team and coaching them along the way.

Actually, quite a lot. Our services aren’t limited to fundraising. We can offer growth support (go-to-market, market entry, and sales materials) and M&A consulting if you’re thinking about an exit. We can also help to elevate your marketing materials, design or website – whatever is needed to grow one’s business.
